esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
// Connection errors (counter) — use INCREASE for window delta
| WHERE haproxy.connections.errors IS NOT NULL
| STATS err_increase = SUM(INCREASE(haproxy.connections.errors))
  BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name, haproxy.addr
// Adjust threshold for sensitivity (10 = 10 new errors in window)
| WHERE err_increase > 10
| EVAL alert_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(haproxy.proxy_name), "::", TO_STRING(haproxy.service_name), "::", COALESCE(TO_STRING(haproxy.addr), ""))
| SORT err_increase DESC
| LIMIT 50
